grant_title: Pediatric Hematology and Oncology Research Center of Excellence Pilot Grant Program
project_area: Pediatric cancer and blood disorders research, including disease biology, novel therapeutic approaches, biomarkers, symptom reduction, supportive care, outcome disparities, and survivorship care
demographic_requirements: Applicants identifying as individuals underrepresented in the life sciences (as defined by the NIH) are strongly encouraged to apply and may receive priority during review.
eligibility_summary: Open to Rutgers faculty, students, and trainees. Assistant Professors within two years of first post-training appointment and students/trainees require a letter of support from a Chair or primary mentor. Projects must align with pediatric cancer or blood disorders research.
